---
title: "Team Dossiers"
description: "Thirty MLB team research rooms built for fans, journalists, and broadcasters."
---

::: {.page-intro .team-directory-intro}
<span class="eyebrow">League research directory</span>

# Thirty teams, one repeatable research standard

Open a club dossier to see the team fingerprint, strongest player movement, leading pitch identities, matchup edges, bullpen options, and three broadcaster-ready research notes.
:::

{{< include includes/team-dossier-index.html >}}
